svg.title: PFAS hotspot heatmap – anonymized field data
svg.desc: An anonymized geospatial heatmap showing PFAS (per- and polyfluoroalkyl substance) contamination hotspots detected via hyperspectral C-F stretch absorption at 1350–1450 nm and 1700–1800 nm. Color ramp from background (cool) to acute hotspot (warm-red). R² 0.88, RMSE 0.11 µg/kg.
svg.text: PFAS hotspot heatmap — drone HSI survey
C-F stretch bands: 1350–1450 nm + 1700–1800 nm · R² 0.88 · RMSE 0.11 µg/kg
PFAS concentration (estimated) · EPA health advisory: 0.004 µg/L water
⚠ Anonymized site · coordinate grid suppressed · for research use only
